Meta.tagline: Full loads, containers, tractor haulage. To and from Kefalonia.

Announcement.text: A new logistics company in Kefalonia — handling all freight to and from the island.

Hero.title: Reliable logistics for Kefalonia
Hero.subtitle: Full loads, containers and tractor haulage to and from the island. With the consistency you'd expect from a partner you can rely on.

Trust.label: Serving the main ports and hubs

Services.title: A full range of services for every load
Services.subtitle: From full loads to containers and tractor haulage — we move your cargo with responsibility and transparency.
Services.fullLoadsDesc: FTL transport with insured trucks. Ideal for large or sensitive freight bound for the island.
Services.containersDesc: Container transport of all standard types. Coordinating from/to the port; customs clearance arranged on request.
Services.haulageDesc: Tractor haulage services for heavy or specialised loads. Modern equipment, experienced drivers.

Process.title: From quote to delivery in 4 steps
Process.step1Desc: Fill in the form or call us. Tell us what, where from and where to.
Process.step2Desc: We send you the price and schedule the same or next business day.
Process.step3Desc: We coordinate the pickup of your freight and the ferry crossing.
Process.step4Desc: We deliver to the final destination with confirmation of receipt.

Routes.title: Connecting Kefalonia with mainland Greece
Routes.subtitle: Daily routes to and from all major ports.

QuoteCTA.title: Ready to move your freight?
QuoteCTA.subtitle: Send us the details and we'll come back with a price the same or next business day.

items.q: How fast can you take on a shipment?
items.a: In most cases within 24 to 48 hours of confirmation. Heavy or specialised loads may need a little extra planning.

items.q: Do you cover all of mainland Greece?
items.a: Yes. We run daily routes from/to Athens, Patras, Thessaloniki and Igoumenitsa, and handle ad-hoc routes on request.

items.q: Do you collect containers directly from the port?
items.a: Yes. We coordinate with the port and handle pickup and transport of containers of all standard types.
All vehicles are insured. For high-value freight we recommend additional cargo insurance and we arrange it for you.
Bank transfer, cash on delivery, or credit on agreement for repeat customers.

Contact.title: Tell us what you need to move
Contact.subtitle: Fill in the form or call +30 6938 255 178. We reply within 24 hours.
Contact.name: Full name
Contact.messagePlaceholder: What are you shipping? From where to where?
Contact.success: Thanks! We received your message and will be in touch shortly.
Contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or call us at +30 6938 255 178.
Contact.consent: By submitting you accept our Privacy Policy.

Quote.title: Tell us what you'd like us to move
Quote.subtitle: The more detail you give us, the faster we can come back with a price.
Quote.name: Full name
Quote.notesPlaceholder: Dimensions, sensitive cargo, pickup hours, anything else…
Quote.success: We got your request. We'll come back with a price shortly.
Quote.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or give us a call.

Footer.tagline: A new logistics company based in Skala, Kefalonia. Full loads, containers, tractor haulage.
